question_text: Explain one environmental advantage and one environmental disadvantage of using geothermal energy compared to burning fossil fuels.
correct_answer: Advantage: Geothermal energy produces little or no greenhouse gases or air pollution, unlike fossil fuels which produce CO₂ and cause climate change. Disadvantage: Geothermal power plants can only be built in specific locations with hot underground rocks, limiting where they can be used.
explanation: Geothermal energy is clean and doesn't contribute to global warming, but it is location-dependent, unlike fossil fuels which can be transported and used anywhere. Accept other valid answers such as: geothermal has minimal waste compared to fossil fuels, or geothermal may cause minor earthquakes.
